calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Ngo for Tom Tran (Petitioner).

The Court noted that a second amended petition was filed, that the notice was issued prior to the petition being filed and stated that it was not filed with sufficient notice of today's date. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to August 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Ngo to provide proper notice and for filing of a corrected inventory and appraisal.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Arash Moussavian specially appearing for Attorney Brian Ngo on behalf of Tom Tran (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there are some procedural issues, that there is no notice of the amendment, that a corrected inventory and appraisal is needed, and that it has not been provided with an order. Mr. Moussavian stated that Counsel did not provide him with information regarding these shortcomings, that Mr. Ngo was hoping for a continuance, that he does not know why Mr. Ngo is not here and that Mr. Ngo did not provide a preferred date. The Court stated that Mr. Moussavian should be prepared to address the Court, that it is not useful to have someone here that has no information and is not able to address the issues, and that Mr. Ngo has an obligation to be here and correct this, and to thoroughly prepare who ever does come in his place. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to July 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the Attorney of record to be present.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
